message:
refactor(ux): polish beginner mode indicator and update gitignore

BeginnerModeIndicator.tsx Changes:
- Remove dismiss button (×) from the beginner mode indicator pill
- Update tooltip guidance from "Press Ctrl+B to disable" to "Manage in Settings"
- Remove unused `toggle` function import from useBeginnerMode hook

Rationale: The quick dismiss button was too easy to accidentally click,
causing users to disable beginner mode unintentionally. Directing users
to the Settings overlay provides a more deliberate experience and ensures
they understand the full scope of beginner mode options before disabling.

.gitignore Changes:
- Add `.beads/bd.sock.startlock` pattern to ignore the beads daemon socket
  startup lockfile, preventing accidental commits of transient IPC artifacts

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -67,6 +67,7 @@ packages/web/audit-ui.ts
 
 # Temporary beads tracking data
 .beads/beads.left.*
+.beads/bd.sock.startlock
 
 # Web static database must be deployed with the site
 # (kept small ~1.4MB; required for initial load)
